extracted_blocked_gaps.clay_requirement: Construct Wightman distributions for the four-dimensional Yang-Mills theory from the Euclidean candidate.
extracted_blocked_gaps.current_evidence: Repo contains OS/Wightman authority and boundary receipts, but Sprint 104 finds no complete distribution-level reconstruction proof for the current candidate.
extracted_blocked_gaps.reason_not_closed: The dossier cannot infer Wightman distributions from partial OS material alone.
extracted_blocked_gaps.required_resolution: Provide a full OS-to-Wightman reconstruction proof for the candidate Schwinger functions, including temperedness, locality, covariance, and positivity consequences.

extracted_blocked_gaps.clay_requirement: Establish Poincare covariance of the resulting Wightman theory.
extracted_blocked_gaps.current_evidence: Repo contains Euclidean and transfer-boundary receipts but no complete Minkowski covariance reconstruction for the Clay lane.
extracted_blocked_gaps.reason_not_closed: Partial Euclidean invariance receipts do not close the Lorentzian Wightman covariance requirement.
extracted_blocked_gaps.required_resolution: Derive Poincare covariance after reconstruction and bind it to the candidate field algebra.

extracted_blocked_gaps.current_evidence: Repo records transfer-gap and OS boundary material, but not a complete Wightman-spectrum theorem for the candidate.
extracted_blocked_gaps.reason_not_closed: A transfer-gap receipt is not itself the Wightman spectrum condition.
extracted_blocked_gaps.required_resolution: Prove the reconstructed Hilbert-space energy-momentum spectrum lies in the closed forward cone and bind the mass gap to that spectrum.

extracted_blocked_gaps.clay_requirement: Prove existence and mass gap for any compact simple gauge group G.
extracted_blocked_gaps.current_evidence: The current manuscript evidence is SU(3)-scoped.
extracted_blocked_gaps.reason_not_closed: The Jaffe-Witten statement is not limited to SU(3).
extracted_blocked_gaps.required_resolution: Generalize every group-dependent estimate and nontriviality witness from SU(3) to arbitrary compact simple G.

extracted_blocked_gaps.clay_requirement: Prove the mass gap without assuming the physical mass scale being proved.
extracted_blocked_gaps.current_evidence: Sprint 103 records a continuum bridge using WC3, RG effective mass, transfer comparison, and asymptotic freedom.
extracted_blocked_gaps.reason_not_closed: Sprint 104 cannot certify that this route has been proved without circular dependence on the desired gap.
extracted_blocked_gaps.required_resolution: Prove that WC3-controlled small-field expansion gives m_eff(a) > 0 independently, then use asymptotic freedom only for physical scale behavior.

extracted_evidence_items.claim_recorded: Sprint 103 records inhabited proof-argument receipts for Dobrushin, uniform polymer activity, and WC3 uniform cluster summability.
Sprint 103 records a continuum mass-gap proof-argument lane using WC3 control, RG generated mass, transfer comparison, and physical-scale behavior.
Sprint 103 records a nontrivial SU(3) continuum measure witness from the non-Abelian curvature self-interaction structure.
Sprint 101 separates the local candidate lane from external Clay acceptance and completeness gates.

remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.closure_input: A DASHI-native lower bound that separates the transfer gap from the mass scale being established.
remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.title: Transfer-gap lower bound

remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.closure_input: A DASHI-native restoration theorem carrying the OS3 spatial route into Poincare covariance and the spectrum condition.
remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.title: Symmetry restoration

remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.closure_input: A DASHI-native parameter table and audit proving every group-dependent estimate for any compact simple G.
remaining_dashi_native_theorem_obligatio.title: Compact simple group parameter table/completeness audit

supplied_gap_reductions.decision: Convert the Sprint 104 circularity objection into the transfer-gap lower-bound obligation.
Keep WC3 and uniform polymer activity constants as the quantitative input lane for the transfer comparison.
Treat OS3 spatial-only blocking as the Euclidean route input that must be paired with restoration.
Merge Poincare covariance and spectrum condition into the symmetry-restoration obligation.
Replace SU(3)-only closure with a compact-simple-G parameter table and completeness audit.
